title: Oeuvre
description: Create artwork and bring it to life!
body:
[Discord Server](https://discord.com/invite/xHRwb8mPKB)

![About Image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/db13736f814f7b474d16f2c26b4a84dbc0aeb211.png)

"Oeuvre" is a French word commonly associated in art. It is used to describe an artst's/composer's/author's complete body of work.

The Player will be able to draw their art on Sketchbook Paper, slide those pages into the Sketchbook, and summon those creations to life!

![Progression](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/621439840871a05cece2a37b0bc160298e717318.png)


![The Illustrator](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b641aa2efaad647e527bb75549ae1cf7ecf2aac9.png)

The Illustrator can be found in Woodland Mansions, and spawns during Raids.

![Living Ink](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3bb04281d5818c6e2b6a9fc135caccb946153371.png)

When the mob is killed, it drops the Living Ink, a basic material for the mod.


![Craft Artists Desk](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c355ca93c0a8382670e73650dbef5032508adcee.png)

![The Designer, a new Villager profession](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e3a8ca883990b78fb3e5ebe3d59fd8009f7f1ccd.png)

The Living Ink can be used to craft the Artist's Desk. It can also be used as a new Villager Profession!

![Artist Desk GUI](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ed3243eff86a709052fcd81ba61955bd2d944c7d.png)

![Sketchbook Craft](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3b9969699a417c1ceac562be11664d50ae0c769e.png)

![Sketchbook Paper Craft](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/848154ef5037be66a646b4201579bd06ebe8ee2b.png)

![Animating Frame Craft](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/964c5feaf11bbfb123f0f83e4ee9ef5b4751da92.png)

![Copy Sketchbook Paper onto Another Craft](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ffab2afb5e649cb0511cb486933a434803685d1c.png)

The Artist's Desk has 3 slots. 2 inputs and 1 result.

![Use Sketchbook paper to Draw!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ae77f043373170ad6897894773f9f501adf63daa.png)

![Putting Sketchbook Paper with a Drawing on an Animating Frame to Summon!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5b18327593b5da1e273d2b98b71b3f3e2cfd2a9e.png)

Use the Sketchbook Paper to start Drawing! The Paper can then be put into a Sketchbook and used, or it can also be placed on an Animating Frame!
